nodes.name: engzee_signal_segmentation
nodes.description: Performs Engzee segmentation on a raw signal to detect specific physiological events, likely QRS complexes in an ECG signal. It applies a series of filtering and thresholding steps to identify these segments.

inputs.name: signal
inputs.constraints: A 1D array representing the time-series signal.

inputs.name: sampling_rate
inputs.constraints: The sampling frequency of the signal in Hz.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.constraints: A decision threshold used to identify peaks or events in the processed signal.

outputs.name: engzee_segments
outputs.constraints: An array of indices corresponding to the detected segments or event locations in the original signal.

nodes.type_signature: (signal: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: float, threshold: float) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: transient_event_locator_from_sequence. Transforms a 1D numerical sequence by applying sequential filters, typically involving moving averages and difference operators, to accentuate regions of rapid change. It then isolates specific points in the processed sequence that cross a given threshold, returning the indices of these detected transient events.. Applications: Detecting P-wave and S-wave arrival times in a seismic waveform to locate an earthquake's epicenter., Identifying high-volume trading events or anomalies in a financial instrument's time-series data., Finding pulsar signals or transient astronomical events within noisy radio telescope data., Detecting fault spikes or transient anomalies in sensor data from an industrial manufacturing process.

nodes.name: prepare_engzee_parameters
nodes.description: Calculates algorithm-specific time-window constants and gain factors from the sampling rate and initial threshold.

inputs.name: sampling_rate
inputs.constraints: The sampling frequency of the signal in Hz.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.constraints: The initial detection threshold for peak amplitude.

outputs.name: algo_params
outputs.constraints: A dictionary of calculated parameters for the detection logic.

nodes.name: apply_qrs_bandpass_filter
nodes.description: Applies a differentiator (high-pass) and a subsequent low-pass filter to the raw signal, effectively creating a band-pass filter to isolate QRS frequency content.

outputs.name: qrs_enhanced_signal
outputs.constraints: The filtered signal with accentuated QRS complexes.

nodes.name: scan_for_rpeaks
nodes.description: Performs the core iterative detection. It scans the filtered signal, dynamically updates high and low thresholds, finds threshold crossings, validates them against timing and morphology criteria, and pinpoints the final peak in the original signal.

inputs.name: qrs_enhanced_signal
inputs.constraints: The filtered signal from the preprocessing step.

inputs.name: algo_params
inputs.constraints: The pre-calculated parameters for the algorithm.

outputs.name: detected_peaks
outputs.constraints: A list of indices corresponding to detected R-peaks.

nodes.type_signature: (raw_signal: np.ndarray, qrs_enhanced_signal: np.ndarray, algo_params: dict) -> list[int]

nodes.name: postprocess_peaks
nodes.description: Sorts the detected R-peak locations and removes any duplicate entries.

inputs.name: detected_peaks
inputs.constraints: The raw list of detected R-peak indices.

outputs.name: engzee_segments
outputs.constraints: A sorted array of unique R-peak indices.
